data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auto-start settings.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that 'Auto-start settings (host must join first)' is satisfied. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the auto-start settings for the Zoom integration or any other integrations. As such, it is unclear whether this requirement is met, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the implementation of auto-start settings.
